images.alt:
A close-up portrait fills the frame with the face of a woman emerging from a pale, textured background. Her eyes, shadowed with dark makeup, stare directly forward with an intense and unsettling calm. A crown made of twisted thorn branches wraps tightly around her forehead, its sharp points extending outward in tangled directions. Across her mouth, rough cloth and thorny vines are bound together with frayed crimson cords, creating the impression of enforced silence. Strands of brown hair spill around her face, blending into painterly smears and abstract textures that dissolve into the surrounding space. Red fibers and scratches sweep diagonally across the image, adding movement and a sense of emotional tension. The color palette is dominated by muted whites, earthy browns, charcoal blacks, and deep blood-red accents. Soft light illuminates the center of the face while the edges fade into shadow and abstraction. The overall composition combines fine portrait detail with distressed painterly effects, creating a dark, gothic atmosphere that feels both fragile and confrontational.
Keywords:
thorn crown, bound mouth, gothic portrait, horror art, dark beauty, tangled branches, crimson threads, haunting gaze, painterly texture, surreal portrait, restraint, atmospheric

images.alt: Square-format illustration in the classic Charles Schulz-inspired newspaper comic aesthetic, clean black ink outlines, flat hand-colored fills, simple expressive shapes, minimal shading, bright cheerful daytime lighting. A stylish white beagle and a small yellow bird stroll confidently along Madison Avenue in New York City, both dressed in ultra-chic luxury-inspired fashion with designer-patterned hoodies, matching sneakers, oversized sunglasses, and coordinated accessories. The beagle carries a designer shoulder bag and holds a Starbucks coffee cup with a recognizable green logo, while the bird carries a small shopping bag. Background rendered entirely in the same Charles Schulz cartoon style, including simplified Manhattan buildings, hand-drawn Madison Avenue street signs, whimsical clouds, stylized trees, a distant Empire State Building, classic New York mailbox, and yellow taxis. A high-end luxury boutique with a sophisticated but nondescript fictional name and elegant window displays lines the sidewalk. record.bridgyOriginalText: And here's what nobody talks about. You also need to stop assuming your AI tool is a vault. It's not. Anything you paste into a prompt can be logged, stored, or used to train future models. If you're typing client details, proprietary code, or personal data into a free AI tool, you're making a choice about security that you might regret. Perfect privacy doesn't exist in most consumer AI platforms. Read the terms. Assume your input is not confidential. That's not paranoia (4/6)
